basic_details.job_title: Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 86 Manager, Senior Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bank of Baroda is hiring for 86 vacancies across 5 officer-level posts in its Corporate and Institutional Credit (C&IC) department, ranging from Manager to Chief Manager grade in both Credit Analyst and C&IC Relationship roles. Online registration opened on 16 June 2026, and the last date to apply and pay the fee is 6 July 2026. Eligible candidates need a postgraduate finance qualification or CA/CMA/CS/CFA, relevant banking credit experience, and willingness to serve anywhere in India.

application_fee.details: The application fee for this recruitment is fixed by category and must be paid online; it is non-refundable even if the online test is not conducted or the candidate is not shortlisted for an interview.

qualification.details: The educational qualification for Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026 is identical across all 5 posts, while the age limit and experience requirement increase with seniority. Candidates should also note that the bank will only consider qualifications from institutions recognised by the Government of India or bodies like the AICTE. | Educational Qualification: Graduation in any discipline, plus a Post Graduate Degree or Diploma with specialisation in Finance (or its equivalent), OR a professional qualification such as CA, CMA, CS, or CFA. Age: Calculated as on 1 June 2026, ranging from a minimum of 25 years (Manager grade) to a maximum of 42 years (Chief Manager grade). Nationality: Indian citizens are eligible, along with certain categories of Nepali, Bhutanese, Tibetan refugee, and Indian-origin candidates from specified countries, subject to an eligibility certificate from the Government of India where applicable. Posting Condition: Only candidates willing to serve anywhere in India should apply, since the bank can post selected officers to any branch or office at its discretion.

salary_details.details: Pay for Bank of Baroda C&IC officers follows the standard bipartite settlement scale used across the banking industry, with the figure increasing through fixed annual increments up to a ceiling for each grade. Selected candidates also receive allowances and perquisites as per the bank's policies, in addition to this basic pay. | In-Hand Salary Calculator 2026

selection_process: Selection for Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026 can include application scrutiny
though the bank retains the right to skip or modify any stage. Final selection depends on combined performance across whichever stages are actually conducted.
If a written test is held
150-minute online exam split into four sections
three of which only need to be passed rather than scored well in.
and Professional Knowledge will be available bilingually in English and Hindi

while the English Language section will be in English only. Sections 1 to 3 are qualifying only and do not count toward the final score; candidates need at least 40% in General/EWS or 35% in Reserved categories to clear each of these sections
and there is no negative marking anywhere in the test.
Candidates who clear the online test (or are otherwise shortlisted) move on to a psychometric assessment and/or personal interview
where the minimum qualifying score is 60% for General category and 55% for Reserved category candidates. If two or more candidates tie at the cut-off mark
the older candidate is ranked higher in the merit list.
is tentatively planned across more than two dozen cities
with the final allotted centre confirmed in the call letter.
Also Read: Karnataka Police Constable Notification Out for 3991 Vacancies
how_to_apply: Bank of Baroda accepts applications for this recruitment only through its official website; no offline or postal applications will be considered.
Visit www.bankofbaroda.bank.in and navigate to the Careers section, then Current Opportunities.
Register using a valid personal email ID and contact number that you can keep active until the recruitment process is complete.
Fill in personal, educational, and work experience details carefully, since no changes are allowed once the form is submitted.
Upload your photograph (200 x 230 pixels, 20-50 KB) and signature (140 x 60 pixels, 10-20 KB) in JPG/JPEG format, signed in your normal handwriting and not in capital letters.
Upload your resume, Date of Birth proof, educational certificates (combined in one PDF), and category/PWD/experience certificates where applicable, each as a PDF on A4 size not exceeding 500 KB.
Pay the applicable application fee online using a Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.
Save and print the system-generated application form and fee receipt for your future reference.
Apply Online for Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026
important_instructions: The age limits mentioned above apply to General category candidates as on 1 June 2026. Candidates from reserved categories get additional years added to the upper age limit, but only for posts where reservation roster points actually exist.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application and pay the fee is 6 July 2026; online registration began on 16 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 86 total vacancies across 5 posts: Manager – Credit Analyst (4), Senior Manager – Credit Analyst (38), Chief Manager – Credit Analyst (1), Senior Manager – C&IC Relationship (36), and Chief Manager – C&IC Relationship (7).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹850 plus payment gateway charges for General, EWS, and OBC candidates, and ₹175 plus payment gateway charges for SC, ST, PWD, ESM/DESM, and Women candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum CIBIL score required for Bank of Baroda C&IC posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a minimum CIBIL score of 680 at the time of joining, and those with a history of loan or credit card default may be deemed ineligible.

faq.question: Q5. Is there a service bond for Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates must serve the bank for at least 3 years from the date of joining, or pay ₹5 lakh in lieu of completing the bond.

faq.question: Q6. What is the eligibility for Manager – Credit Analyst at Bank of Baroda?
faq.answer: Candidates must be aged 25 to 30 years, hold a graduation degree plus a finance-specialised PG degree/diploma (or CA/CMA/CS/CFA), and have at least 3 years of credit experience in a bank or NBFC.

faq.question: Q7. Is there a written exam for Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The bank may conduct an online test of 150 marks across Reasoning, English Language, Quantitative Aptitude, and Professional Knowledge, but it reserves the right to skip the written test and proceed directly to other selection stages.

faq.question: Q8. What is the probation period for selected candidates?
faq.answer: Selected candidates are placed on probation for 12 months (1 year) of active service from their date of joining.

faq.question: Q9. Can fresh graduates apply for Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, every post under this recruitment requires a minimum of 3 to 8 years of relevant credit or banking experience in addition to the educational qualification, so the posts are not open to candidates without prior work experience.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website to apply for Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online at www.bankofbaroda.bank.in under the Careers section's Current Opportunities page; no other mode of application is accepted.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Bank of Baroda C&IC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application and pay the fee is 6 July 2026; online registration began on 16 June 2026.
